response: Thank you for calling Dr. Shelby’s office. How can I help you today?
No problem—call us back when you’re free and we’ll continue scheduling. If you want, we can also text key instructions once your appointment is booked.
We do not provide home visits. We can schedule a phone or in-office consultation.
For non-emergencies, you can email the office. For urgent symptoms, call the office or seek emergency care if severe.
If you reached our answering service, they can pass urgent prep questions to on-call staff. For emergencies, go to the ER/911.
Provider lunches are coordinated by staff and typically occur Mon–Wed. If you’re a rep, contact the office for scheduling.
We do not offer home visits. We can schedule an in-office or phone consultation and guide next steps.
If a staff member is remote/unavailable, we can’t always transfer live. We’ll take a message and call you back.
If this is after hours and urgent, the answering service can route to the on-call team. For life-threatening emergencies, call 911.
If our system is down, we’ll take your information and call you back as soon as it’s restored.
